untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on order book microstructure conditions (competitor bid matching patterns, time precedence, bid-ask levels) that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived technical indicators. Required conditions include: 'competitor matching behavior', 'historical win rate of leapfrog skips', and 'time precedence tracking' — these require order flow and order book data not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy market confidence and competitive pressure using vol_ratio_20 (volume surge indicates competitive activity) and atr_14 (spread size proxy), but the core logic of tracking competitor bid patterns and securing time precedence cannot be reliably translated to price-action indicators. This strategy is fundamentally an order book/microstructure play requiring Level 2 data and order matching engine insights.
